endpoint.description: the fabric endpoint name that judged (never a secret value)

model.description: the judge model that answered, when the endpoint names one

verdict.description: confirm: value stands; correct: value overruled in place (see priorValue); flag: questionable/too thin to judge

priorValue.description: the fast value the judge overruled — present on a `correct`, so "what changed" is inspectable

priorState.description: the field state the review moved off of (e.g. provisional)

note.description: the judge's rationale — the flag reason, or why a value was corrected
